entity.label: Ilai
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: An Ahohite, one of David’s chief warriors (1 Chr. 11:29); called also Zalmon (2 Sam. 23:28).

nodes.label: Ilai
nodes.description: An Ahohite, one of David’s chief warriors (1 Chr. 11:29); called also Zalmon (2 Sam. 23:28).

verses.text: Zalmon the Ahohite, Maharai the Netophathite,
Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,
